steps.name: implementation
steps.acceptance: Output-shift mode added to src/model.py and src/train.py. All unit tests pass: output shift zeros, self-inclusive causal mask, no SOS in sequence, forward-inverse consistency, backward compatibility, zero-init, Jacobian triangularity.

steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: 500-step diagnostic on ethanol with output-shift. log_det/dof < 5.0 at step 500 confirms hypothesis. If log_det/dof > 5.0 at step 100, hypothesis is wrong — report FAILURE.

steps.name: angle_sanity_val
steps.acceptance: 1000-step multi-molecule run with output-shift. VF > 0.40 on ethanol. If not met, try alpha_pos=1.0 fallback.

steps.name: angle_sanity_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep completed if SANITY val is promising; best config selected.

steps.name: angle_sanity_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run with best SANITY config; VF >= 0.50 on >= 4/8 molecules.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_val
steps.acceptance: Validation run with heuristic intervention if SANITY promising but below target.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep over lr, n_steps, alpha_pos. Best config selected.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run with best HEURISTICS config.

steps.name: angle_scale_val
steps.acceptance: Validation run with d_model=256, n_blocks=12 if HEURISTICS shows capacity bottleneck.

steps.name: angle_scale_sweep
steps.acceptance: Sweep if SCALE val is promising.

steps.name: angle_scale_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run with best SCALE config, 50k steps.

steps.name: final_report
steps.acceptance: Final Experiment Report written to reports/final_report.md with all results, plots, and story validation.

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_006; pre-merge checks pass.
